title: Index Configuration
existingConfig: A configuration already exists with {{count}} field(s)

filters.noFilters: No filters configured. Filters restrict which entities are displayed in the index.
filters.pathHint: Path to field in JSON data (e.g., general_info.rank.value)

fields.noFields: No fields configured. Fields define the columns displayed in the index.
fields.pathToValue: Path to value in data (e.g., general_info.rank.value)
